message:
Running command: # Step 36 CheckAntennas is running (OpenROAD PID 625425, 100% CPU, 717MB RAM)
# It's running antenna_check.tcl which reads the post-DRT ODB. 
# Antenna check on 227K cells takes time - monitor.
sleep 600
ps -p 625425 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ANTENNA CHECK ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -10
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
